case_title: DOMINIC LEONARD CHARTRAND ET AL VS. MIKE QUAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS MOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARTRAND, DOMINIC LEONARD AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN, MIKE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS DOMINIC LEONARD CHARTRAND AND JOSEPHINE KIRSTEN RIESE ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKE QUAN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
